item.title: SkySportsPL: Sky Sports Premier League @SkySportsPL · 2min BREAKING: Bournemouth have reached an agreement in principle for Marco Ros
item.description: Sky Sports Premier League @SkySportsPL · 2min BREAKING: Bournemouth have reached an agreement in principle for Marco Rose to become their new head coach, with the 49-year-old set to officially start in the summer. 16 19 96 3 mil

item.title:

The game that will potential
item.description:
Alex Crook reposteó Star Sports Bookmakers @StarSports_Bet · 9min | ALEX CROOK EXCLUSIVE
The game that will potentially decide the title-race is almost here and @Alex_Crook has shared his thoughts in his latest blog.
18+ GambleAware De starsportsbet.co.uk 2 4 117

item.title: eurofootcom: Ben Jacobs reposteó EuroFoot @eurofootcom · 14 abr. Marco Rose is the leading contender to replace Andoni Iraola at Bou
item.description: Ben Jacobs reposteó EuroFoot @eurofootcom · 14 abr. Marco Rose is the leading contender to replace Andoni Iraola at Bournemouth, reports @JacobsBen / @alex_crook . 21 63 1 mil 32 mil

item.title: alex_crook: Alex Crook @alex_crook · 6min Cita Alex Crook @alex_crook · 14 abr. Former Dortmund boss Marco Rose is a leading conte
item.description: Alex Crook @alex_crook · 6min Cita Alex Crook @alex_crook · 14 abr. Former Dortmund boss Marco Rose is a leading contender to replace the outgoing Andoni Iraola. Ipswich's Kieran McKenna is another potential option #AFCB 1 1 27 2 mil
